response.justification: Candidate has well over the required 6+ years of full-stack experience, with recent hands-on work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Kubernetes that maps directly to the primary stack. Current role explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which matches the AI agent development requirement. Background includes Java, multiple databases, TDD/CI-CD discipline, and architecture-level contributions across diverse domains, indicating strong engineering breadth and reliability.
strengths: Direct, recent experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB and AWS in production
Active AI-agent and MCP tooling work aligned with the role's AI requirement
Demonstrated engineering discipline: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing frameworks
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in the resume
Kotlin not listed; Java exposure is present but appears limited and dated
PostgreSQL/relational DB depth unclear; MongoDB and MySQL are the only databases cited
